name: Potluck Surprise
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Pimento (Chopped), approximately 1 cup shredded, 8 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the eggplant into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Use 1/2 cup of sliced pimento stuffed olives in place of the pimento.
3. Heat oven to 350 degrees F.
4. Cook macaroni according to package directions, then drain.
5. In a Dutch oven, cook and stir meat and onion until meat is brown. Drain excess fat.
6. Stir in salt, Italian seasoning, pepper, macaroni, eggplant, sour cream, pimento, and 1 cup of cheese.
7. Transfer mixture into an ungreased 3-quart casserole.
8. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
9. Bake uncovered until eggplant is tender, about 45 to 50 minutes.
10. Serve hot.
